Zeromonk · University Knowledge Partner Network

anyone else does.

Zeromonk connects universities with 300+ schools across India through structured innovation sessions — giving your institution consistent, credible access to students long before their application journey begins.

Why Zeromonk

The student pipeline problem
no one is solving well.

Most universities invest heavily in admissions marketing — but reach students only after intent has formed. Zeromonk reverses that. Your institution shows up consistently, credibly, and early — through structured innovation sessions in schools.

01

Early Engagement With Students

Participate in sessions when students are still forming their perspective on higher education — not when they're already shortlisting colleges. That's when brand impressions are made.

02

Brand Recall Across 300+ Schools

A single partnership gives your institution recurring presence across the entire Zeromonk school network. Students encounter your faculty and institution multiple times throughout the year.

03

Thought Leadership, Not Advertising

Your professors don't pitch your university — they teach, share expertise, and inspire. Students remember institutions whose faculty made them think, not whose brochures they received.

04

Long-Term Admissions Pipeline

Consistent school engagement builds a funnel of students who already know your institution — by name, faculty, and quality of engagement. Every admissions cycle starts warm.

05

Academic Collaboration Opportunities

Beyond admissions, Zeromonk opens doors for joint research, faculty exchange, and curriculum co-development with schools — strengthening your academic ecosystem.

06

Structured, Measurable Engagement

Every session is logged. Every school interaction tracked. Your dashboard gives clear visibility into reach, student engagement, and session history across the full network.

The Opportunity

One partnership.
3,000 touchpoints
a year.

Zeromonk's school network runs 10 innovation sessions per school, per year. As a Knowledge Partner, your institution participates across the network — making your presence consistent, not occasional.

This isn't a conference slot or a campus visit. It's recurring, structured access to students across hundreds of schools — without your team managing a single session.

What's Included

Everything your institution needs
to engage meaningfully.

Zeromonk handles the infrastructure. You bring the expertise. Here's what every Knowledge Partner receives.

School Inventory Access

Browse the full listing of Zeromonk partner schools — by city, state, board type, and student strength. Understand exactly where your partnership reaches.

Session Participation

Your faculty participates in structured 30-minute innovation sessions. We handle scheduling, logistics, and student coordination. You just show up and share expertise.

Student Engagement Data

Your dashboard shows session attendance, student idea submissions, and engagement metrics — giving your institution clear insight into reach and impact.

Co-branded Session Materials

Session presentations and study materials carry your institution's branding — reinforcing your identity with students consistently across the year.

Dedicated Partnership Manager

Every Knowledge Partner is assigned a relationship manager who handles coordination, scheduling, and platform support throughout the partnership.

Annual Impact Report

At the end of every academic year, you receive a detailed report on your institution's reach, student interactions, and sessions — shareable with institutional stakeholders.

that value real engagement.

How It Works

From application to
active partnership — four steps.

01

Apply Online

Submit your institution's details through the Zeromonk application form. Any accredited university in India may apply.

02

Application Review

Our partnerships team evaluates your application and responds within 5 working days. Approved partners proceed to onboarding.

03

Onboarding & Portal Access

You receive portal credentials, a partnership briefing, and access to the full school inventory — segmented by geography and profile.

04

Sessions & Engagement

Your faculty participates in scheduled sessions. Your dashboard tracks reach, engagement, and impact in real time throughout the year.

Built on Zero's School

A network built over
years, not months.

Zeromonk is the university-facing arm of Zero's School — an organisation that has spent years building structured innovation infrastructure in Indian schools. The 300+ school network your institution accesses is the result of that groundwork.

The teams behind Zero's School come from IIT, NIT, Microsoft, Google, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra. The same rigour applies to how we run Knowledge Partnerships.

IITNITMicrosoftGoogleInfosysTech Mahindra

Zeromonk gave us what no education fair ever could — consistent, quality interactions with students who genuinely engaged with our faculty. The impact on admissions intent was visible within one cycle.

— Director of Admissions, Partner University, Pune

Knowledge Partnership

A structured partnership
with measurable returns.

Zeromonk Knowledge Partnerships are annual engagements designed to cover the infrastructure, coordination, and platform access that makes your participation seamless and impactful.

The return — in student reach, brand recall, and admissions pipeline — is structured, tracked, and reported.

  • Access to 300+ schools in a single partnership
  • Faculty participation managed end-to-end
  • Co-branded materials across all sessions
  • Annual impact reporting for institutional stakeholders
  • Dedicated relationship manager throughout
  • NAAC/NBA accreditation documentation support

Annual Knowledge Partnership

Full-year access to the Zeromonk school network and session programme.

Custom
pricing · per year

Partnership fees are structured based on your institution's scale of engagement and geographic reach. Our team will share a detailed proposal after your application is reviewed.

  • School inventory portal access
  • Session participation across the network
  • Co-branded session materials
  • Student engagement dashboard
  • Dedicated partnership manager
  • Annual impact report
  • Academic collaboration opportunities
  • Accreditation documentation package

Applications from all accredited universities in India are welcome. Our team will follow up within 5 working days.
